title: malcolmia chia var. lyrata
intro: Malcolmia chia var. lyrata, also known as the annual white mustard or lyre-leaved whitetop, is a biennial plant species that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and infections. The health benefits of Malcolmia chia var. lyrata include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds and coughs. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used topically as a poultice or cream to treat skin conditions.
